summary: The source contract fixes N at no more than twelve, so the complete subset state space contains at most 4096 masks and does not support unbounded asymptotic runtime scaling.

workload_bound.source_constraint: The input string has length at most 12, yielding exactly 2^12 possible index masks at the legal maximum.

replacement_checks.evidence: The reference classifies each of at most 4096 masks by an outer-character recurrence and performs a twelve-by-4096 submask-maximum transform at the legal maximum.

Authored cases cover minimum and maximum lengths, all-distinct and all-identical strings, alternating characters, complementary palindromes, disjoint-index semantics, and both official larger examples.
